reviewFocus: Check that the packet uses source handles only and keeps finance-sensitive evidence at bounded signal level instead of copying balances, account identifiers, transaction detail, or institution-specific records.
Check that the packet keeps routing advisory, reversible, and caller-owned rather than implying spend, escalation, approval, or schedule authority.
Check that freshness, uncertainty, and no-write constraints remain explicit when finance pressure signals are stale, incomplete, or caller-computed.
outOfScope: Resolving the underlying sources, verifying private records, or reconstructing real finance state.
Approving spend, changing cadence, sending alerts, routing work, or touching production systems.
Inferring entity names, threshold values, account structure, counterparties, or company operating policy from the bounded labels.
